root.name: Format Last Three Bullets on Slide 2 as Numbered List
root.description: Evaluate if, on slide 2, the last three bullets describing types of worms are formatted together as a numbered list, with no extraneous changes.

children.name: Bullets Detailing Types of Worms Are Detected and Numbered
children.description: Checks that the three correct bullets are detected and now form a single numbered list on slide 2.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Slide Content
children.description: Checks that no other content on slide 2 has been altered (besides the bullet formatting).

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 2 remain unchanged.

metadata.task: In slide 2, format the last three bullets which detail the types of worms as a numbered list
